final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: editorial photo, cinematic still
Primary request: vintage American road trip scene with a red convertible driving on Route 66 at sunset
Scene/backdrop: Route 66 highway stretching through desert landscape, scattered cacti and tumbleweeds, distant mesas
Subject: classic red convertible (open top), driver silhouette, motion blur suggesting speed and freedom
Style/medium: 35mm film photography, vintage Americana aesthetic, warm nostalgic tone
Composition/framing: wide shot from rear three-quarter angle, low horizon line, 35mm lens
Lighting/mood: golden hour sunset, dramatic orange-red sky gradients, long shadows, warm rim light on car, carefree and liberating atmosphere
Color palette: burnt orange sky + deep red convertible + warm desert browns + sage green cacti + golden highlights
Materials/textures: weathered asphalt, dusty desert sand, glossy car paint, spiky cactus textures
Constraints: preserve the Route 66 signage or road context, keep the sunset as dominant color driver
Avoid: modern cars, urban elements, oversaturated neon colors, cartoonish rendering, lens flare abuse
